title: storage.conf config file rework prep work and and design doc updates
body:
see commits


#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
Write `None` if there are no user-facing changes, otherwise enter your release note below.
Include "action required" if users need to take action when upgrading.
-->

```release-note
podman info no longer shows the storage.conf configfile location in its output
podman system service is no longer able to reload config files on SIGHUP
```

comments.body: tmt tests failed for commit ba62fe4a2981e23236cb48dd2299c7ade3d1ee0f. @lsm5, @psss, @thrix please check.

Ditto @ashley-cui 's thoughts on the doc.  I'll restart the tests, they have been a bit flakey.
LGTM. I'm going to go ahead and merge.
